body.title: [awaiting_validation] Absorb 113 ADC-era decisions from TheIgors.archive into UU decisions/ store
body.description:
**Problem:** `~/TheIgors.archive/lab/design_docs/decisions/` holds 116 D-slug decision .md files; a measured dedup (2026-06-28) found **113 are MISSING from the UU store** (118 decisions today). These are the foundational ADC-era decisions the lineage was built on — D-agent-datacenter-spec-2026-04-27, D-adc-phase-1..5-2026-04-27, D-announce-protocol-2026-05-01, etc. — which CLAUDE.md explicitly flags as 'historical spec NOT in the store (live in the now-archived palace)'. This ticket absorbs them onto the one canonical substrate so future CC/DS instances grep one ground.
**Proposed shape:** For each of the 113 missing .md decisions: parse the markdown, build a store-shaped decision body preserving the ORIGINAL decision_id and date, set status to reflect reality (the D-adc-phase-* are 'complete' per CLAUDE.md phase map; others 'superseded' or 'historical' as the content indicates), and emit via memory_emit. CRITICAL: stamp each node with the ORIGINAL date via `memory_emit.stamp_for_day_only(decision_id, yyyymmdd)` (NOT now_stamp) so the envelope `emitted_at` is the historical date — /context-load Step 2a/3 sorts by `emitted_at`, so today-stamping 113 nodes would flood 'recent decisions' with 2026-04/05 items for weeks. (Preserving body.date is NOT enough — context-load reads emitted_at, not body.date.) Re-run the dedup grep to confirm 0 missing afterward. The 3 already-present decisions are skipped.
**Affected files:** writes to devlab/runtime/memory/decisions/ (new JSON nodes via memory_emit.py); reads ~/TheIgors.archive/lab/design_docs/decisions/*.md. No code changes.
**Design rules:** canonical memory store one-home (CLAUDE.md); memory_emit.py is the sole write chokepoint; NO SQLITE (source is flat .md, target flat JSON — palace DB is dead and not consulted); preserve original decision date/id (historical fidelity, CP3).
**Scope boundary:** IN — the 113 measured-missing D-slug decisions from archive lab/design_docs/decisions/. OUT — the 359 D-numeric palace-pointer decisions (separate handling: superseded/freeze); tickets and slates (separate absorb tickets); the 3 already-present decisions.
**Test plan:** (1) After run, `grep`-based dedup (the same check used 2026-06-28: for each archive decision slug, confirm a UU decisions/ file contains it) reports 0 missing. (2) Spot-check 5 migrated nodes: original date preserved, decision_id intact, status sensible, body text non-empty. (3) `ls devlab/runtime/memory/decisions/ | wc -l` rises by ~113 (118 -> ~231).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Migrated 113 ADC-era decisions archive->UU store. Verified: 0 missing (was 113), UU decisions 116->229, fidelity (date/title/text/status) holds, historical emitted_at confirmed (2026-05-10 not today). 2 misfiled T- tickets skipped; D-constraints-first-class already present. Proof = re-runnable dedup+fidelity check (migrate_adc_decisions.py); proof_emitter can't bind a data-absorb (no single-node red->green AssertionError form) — missing lever = migration/absorb proof mode.
